headline: Software Engineer | Secure Full-Stack Applications & Production Systems
summary: Graduate Software Engineer with a Bachelor of Computer Science (Software Engineering and Cybersecurity), building secure full-stack web and mobile applications using JavaScript/TypeScript, React/React Native, SQL/NoSQL, and REST APIs. Designed and deployed production-style systems including an AI-assisted resume tailoring platform with strict content validation and an incident management console simulating real-world support workflows. Strong focus on system integrity, maintainability, and practical security principles aligned to the ACSC Essential Eight.

education.details: Major in Software Engineering and Cybersecurity

projects.name: Job Application Assistant
bullets: Designed and developed a full-stack AI-assisted resume tailoring platform generating structured HTML and PDF outputs.
Implemented OpenAI API integration with strict no-fabrication validation logic to enforce factual consistency.
Deployed via VPN-only access (Tailscale) on a cloud VM to restrict public exposure.
Built responsive UI with real-time preview and validation feedback mechanisms.

projects.name: Production Support Incident Console
bullets: Developed a web-based incident management console simulating production support workflows end-to-end.
Implemented structured incident lifecycle tracking with severity classification, status transitions, ownership, and event timelines.
Added SLA-aware monitoring with breach indicators to support prioritisation and operational visibility.
Integrated runbook documentation and root-cause analysis capture.

projects.name: Bunkerify
bullets: Built a cybersecurity assessment platform aligned to the ACSC Essential Eight maturity model.
Designed a 19-question structured assessment with automated scoring and category-level risk breakdowns.
Integrated SendGrid transactional email delivery for automated HTML report generation.
Implemented lead capture and calendar booking workflow.

projects.name: Cancer Awareness Mobile App
bullets: Built a cross-platform mobile application using React Native and TypeScript.
Implemented Firebase integration for authentication, cloud data storage, and messaging workflows.
Added geolocation and media upload capabilities with structured navigation.

experience.title: Web Developer (Volunteer)
bullets: Contributed to front-end and back-end development of the web platform.
Implemented responsive UI components and API-driven features.
Translated stakeholder requirements into maintainable code.

experience.title: Web Developer
bullets: Implemented custom front-end features for an eCommerce website.
Supported server-side functionality for transactional workflows and content updates.
Enhanced responsiveness and cross-device consistency.

certifications: AWS Academy Graduate - AWS Academy Cloud Foundations award
